title: St Paul's Primary learners do well at arts festival
description: SCHOOLS NEWS - Some learners of St...
bodyText:
SCHOOLS NEWS - Some learners of St Paul’s Primary took part in the drama section of the annual South Cape Arts Festival at the George Arts Theatre during the week of 28 July to 1 August.

The school is extremely proud of all its participants, and says the results speak for themselves.

Mufaro Ndikudze (gold+), Kamvelihle Mendela (gold), Ashley Dzingai (gold++), Evile Magoso (gold+), Live Singoai (gold), Azogcoba Nongena (gold), Karabo Mangwane (gold+), Ivilenkosi Nzuza (gold), Khayone Mshumi (gold), Kungawo Gxumisa (gold+), Hayah Omery (gold++) and Brooklyn Lewis (gold++).

Teacher Ilani Conradie (back left) with all the St Paul’s Primary learners who took part in this year’s Scaf.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
